name: Codex
description: Local coding agent via the Codex CLI (codex exec). Runs in non-interactive execution mode: takes a prompt, edits files, and writes its final message to a temp file. No session persistence — each mission is stateless by design.

session.note: codex exec does not support sessions. Each mission starts with a fresh context. The stateful flag in AGENT_CONFIGS has no effect for this harness.

model_selection: -m flag; user selects via UI model picker (default: codex built-in default)
output: Reads final assistant message from --output-last-message temp file after process exits
note: CODEX always routes directly to this harness regardless of the harness selector in the UI.

profile_binding.harness_ref_semantics: Name of a Codex profile (--profile <name>). Maps to ~/.codex/<harness_ref>.config.toml. Use 'default' to omit --profile and run with Codex global defaults.

identity_mode.managed: Read/write ~/.repociv/profiles/<name>/AGENTS.md; inject via system_prompt prepend on dispatch

profile_binding.harness_options_note: Lists available Codex profile names; falls back to listing ~/.codex/*.config.toml filenames
